case_number: Criminal Revision Application No. S-306 of 2021
sections_cited: Section 7 of the Illegal Dispossession Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No. 155 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For hearing of case 2. For hearing of MA No. 9640/2025 20.11.2025 None present for the Applicant Mr. Ishfaq Ahmed Advocate for the Respondent No.2 Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for Respondent No.2 submits that Respondent No.2 was arrayed as an accused before the trial Court, and the trial Court had taken cognizance of the matter. Respondent No.2 challenged such cognizance before this Court through Criminal Revision Application No. S-306 of 2021. By order dated 17.11.2025, this Court allowed the said Criminal Revision Application, set aside the trial Court's order taking cognizance, and consequently dismissed Criminal Complaint No. 1318 of 2020. In view of the fact that the main complaint itself now stands dismissed by this Court, the present Criminal Revision Application, which assails the order dated 03.05.2025 whereby the application under Section 7 of the Illegal Dispossession Act was dismissed, has rendered infructuous, as all subsequent interlocutory proceedings automatically lose their legal validity. Accordingly, this Criminal Revision Application, along with the listed application, is dismissed as having become infructuous. JUDGE
